ucdxml:block:
code-point-attributes &= attribute kTGT_MergedSrc { xsd:string { pattern="H2004-[AB]-\d{4}|H2021-\d{6}|L(19(86|97)|20(06|12))-\d{4}|L2008-\d{4}([AB]|-\d{4})?|N1966-\d{3}-\d{2}[0-9A-Z]{1,2}|N5217-\d{2}|N5314-\d{2}|S1968-\d{4}|UTN42-\d{3}" } }?
code-point-attributes &= attribute kTGT_Numeric { xsd:string { pattern="NaN|[0-9]+|[0-9]+\.[0-9]+" } }?
code-point-attributes &= attribute kTGT_RSUnicode { xsd:string { pattern="\d+\.\d+" } }?
